productDisplayName: Batman Men Off White Printed T-shirt
description: CompositionOff-white T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, slightly ribbed neckline, flock print detailing on the inside of the neckline and graphic print on the frontFitRegularWash careHand wash with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsFlaunt your belief in earning justice the rightful way with this batman T-shirt from bioworld.
